title: No More App Switching: Amazon Adds Luna Games to Prime Video
summary: To encourage adoption, Amazon has made those games available on Prime Video . Amazon Luna , the brand’s game streaming service , relaunched in 2025 to bring a wave of AAA titles to Prime members alongside various party games.
